failureFound.project: a private-repo accident-domain acceptance project (evidence retained in a private repository)
failureFound.desktopMessage: Your report has issues that could not be resolved
failureFound.issue: An additional property 'objects' was included in the root property of visuals/<visual>/visual.json.
failureFound.rootCause: Generated altText was written to root-level visual container objects instead of visual.objects.general.

fixValidated.rule: Enhanced PBIR visual formatting must be written under /visual/objects. Root-level /objects is read-only/incompatible for generated output.
fixValidated.regressionTest: tests/cli_smoke.rs asserts generated visual.json has no root-level objects and has altText under /visual/objects/general.
